title: Grand Theft Auto V
notes:
Follow the dxvk config explained in other posts but as of september 8 you also need to disable esync, your launch options should look like following:
DXVK_CONFIG_FILE=/home/user/gta_dxvk.conf PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%

title: SHOGUN: Total War - Collection
notes: A totally blank launcher screen; after leaving it the game crashed

title: SHOGUN: Total War™ - Gold Edition
notes: Launcher screen is completely blank, but areas are clickable.

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: The launcher added to all Total War games is broken under Proton/WINE. It appears completelly white BUT the buttons actually work (to start the game you have to click somewhere on the top right region). The game works great from that point, although setting anything above 1920x1080 drastically drops the FPS (probably a problem with the old engine). The most serious issue is not related to gameplay - after quitting the game it is still running untill you kill every process related to it manually (all ".exe", all wine related, and the "steam web helper" group).
title: SHOGUN: Total War™ - Collection
Grand Theft Auto V
notes:
Follow the dxvk config explained in other posts but as of september 8 you also need to disable esync, your launch options should look like following:
DXVK_CONFIG_FILE=/home/user/gta_dxvk.conf PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%
